title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Navkar Corporation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Navkar Corporation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Navkar Corporation family as a Distribution Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Navkar Corporation:
Navkar Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navkar Corporation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
